examples: During October 1918 the Austro-Hungarian Empire began to disintegrate.
Worse, biodegradable plastics designed to disintegrate, are increasingly common.
We are genetically programmed to disintegrate and perish, even under ideal conditions.
During the three and a half months of his trial, he seemed to disintegrate.
There is a good chance the Obama campaign is about to disintegrate, if only briefly.
